name: ground_truth_ac7_auto_lockout_nc
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 48, CCI-002238, assessed 2026-05-27). Non-Compliant verdict — automatic lockout did not occur per defined parameters. Sibling to the AC-7.2 lockout threshold case (CCI-000044) — same control family, different CCI, same failure pattern (system failed test). Narrative uses 'Examined/Finding' structure with 'did not occur' gap language. Pins the same _GAP_PHRASES coverage gap as the AC-6 and AC-7.2 siblings. UPDATE 2026-06-18: the _GAP_PHRASES coverage gap this case documented is now FIXED — the 'Examined/Finding' gap wording classifies GAP_DESCRIBING, so the human-verified Non-Compliant verdict is ACCEPTED on the first pass instead of being forced to an abstain by status_narrative_mismatch.

ccis_row.guidance: 002238: The information system automatically locks the account or node for either an organization-defined time period, until the locked account or node is released by an administrator, or delays the next login prompt according to the organization-defined delay algorithm when the maximum number of unsuccessful attempts is exceeded.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the information system to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed configures the information system to automatically lock the account or node until the locked account is released by an administrator and delays the next login prompt for a minimum of 5 seconds when the maximum number of unsuccessful attempts is exceeded.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Account lockout test results — manual test of automatic lockout behavior after exceeding maximum unsuccessful logon attempts.
- Access control policy — signed policy defining lockout and delay parameters.
